title: Swing Volume Profile Pro [WillyAlgoTrader]
author: WillyAlgoTrader
summary_bullets: TradingView indicator: Swing Volume Profile Pro [WillyAlgoTrader] by WillyAlgoTrader.

📊 Swing Volume Profile Pro is an overlay indicator that builds a true volume distribution profile for each completed swing leg — distributing each candle's volume across price bins proportionally to how much of the candle's range overlaps each bin (TPO-like allocation), then calculating the Point of Control (highest-volume price), Value Area (70% of volume around POC), buy/sell delta per bin, and swing VWAP.
The result is a volume profile that maps exactly to the swing structure, not to … Source URL: https://www.tradingview.com/script/7yozLqCv-Swing-Volume-Profile-Pro-WillyAlgoTrader/.
